conservative.name: Divine Distraction
conservative.requirements: 6 favour, target within medium range and not engaged with one of your allies. If you are engaged with the target, add L to the dice pool

success.description: The target becomes confused and gains the Perplexed condition for 2 rounds. He may not perform a maneouvre to engage an enemy during his next turn
As above, and if not engaged with enemies the target can only Assess the Situation on his next turn

boon.description: The target does not gain a free manoeuvre on his next turn

chaosStar.description: What's going on? All allies within close range gain the Perplexed condition while this blessing is recharging

sigmarsComet.description: All enemies with lower Willpower than the target within close range are also affected
